title: Tech
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Meet Noscroll, an AI bot that does your doomscrolling for you
items.description: Noscroll wants to cure doomscrolling with an AI bot that reads the internet for you.

items.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5, bringing company one step closer to an AI ‘super app’
items.description: OpenAI says its latest model offers increased capabilities across a broad variety of categories.

items.title: WhatsApp adds prepaid phone recharges in India as its payments usage still lags
items.description: WhatsApp is rolling out prepaid phone recharges to its 500 million users in India via PayU.

items.title: Trump’s pick to run US cyber agency CISA asks to drop out
items.description: Sean Plankey has requested to withdraw his name to run the U.S. cybersecurity agency after a tumultuous year of chaotic temporary leadership.

items.title: Meta to cut 10% of jobs, or 8,000 employees, report says
items.description: According to an internal memo, Meta plans to begin its sweeping layoffs on May 20.
